data.name: AppStartupFailureMessage
AppUnhandledExceptionMessage
AppendAreaToolTip
data.value: Click to add content; drag here to delete

data.name: DeletePaperBody
data.value: This paper will be permanently removed and cannot be restored from the tray.

data.name: ToolTipDragNoteToTodo
data.value: Drag onto a todo item to link this note

data.name: MarkdownPreviewFailure
data.value: *Preview failed. The original text was kept. Error: {0}*

data.name: OpenMarkdownFailureMessage
data.value: Could not open the default {0} editor: {1}

data.name: ScriptCapsuleEmptyMessage
data.value: This script capsule has nothing to run.

data.name: NotePasteRejectedMessage
data.value: Nothing was inserted because the paste exceeds 30,000 characters, 6,000 characters on one line, or the note limit of 100,000 characters.

data.name: ImageStoreUnavailable
data.value: The image data file could not be loaded. To avoid overwriting existing images, image writes are disabled.

data.name: ImageImportInvalidNote
data.value: The note to bind this image to could not be determined.

data.name: ImageImportFileMissing
data.value: The image file does not exist.

data.name: ImageImportUnsupported
data.value: No insertable image was found, or the image format is unsupported.

data.name: ImageImportUnsupportedFiles
data.value: These image files are not supported: {0}.

data.name: ImageImportDimensionsTooLarge
data.value: The image dimensions exceed the limit. Width and height must each be at most {0} pixels.

data.name: ImageImportTooLargeCompressionDisabled
data.value: The image exceeds {0} MB. Automatic compression is off; enable it and try again.

data.name: ImageImportCompressionUnsafe
data.value: The image cannot be compressed safely without losing its content, so the import was canceled.

data.name: ImageImportCompressionFailed
data.value: Image compression failed, so the import was canceled.

data.name: ImageImportCompressionNotSmaller
data.value: The compressed file was not smaller, so the import was canceled.

data.name: ImageImportCompressedTooLarge
data.value: The compressed image still exceeds {0} MB, so the import was canceled.

data.name: ImageImportTooLarge
data.value: Each image can be at most {0} MB.

data.name: ImageImportSourceTooLarge
data.value: The source image file is too large. The pre-read limit is {0} MB.

data.name: ExternalMarkdownImageExportFailed
data.value: The note images could not be exported, so opening the external editor was canceled.

data.name: ImageImportTotalTooLarge
data.value: The image store has reached its total limit ({0} MB).

data.name: PaperLimitMessage
data.value: You have reached the 100-paper limit. Delete papers you no longer need before creating more.

data.name: ExitSaveFailureMessage
data.value: PaperTodo failed to save and will now exit. Unsaved changes may be lost.

data.name: SaveFailureMessage
StateLoadFailed
data.value: Failed to load data. The file may be in use or corrupted.

data.name: StartupFailureMessage
data.value: Failed to configure startup. Permissions may be insufficient or security software may be blocking it.

data.name: SettingsCollapseExpandedDeepCapsuleOnClick
data.value: Click edge capsule again to retract paper

data.name: TipThemeMode
data.value: Light, dark, or follow the Windows system theme.

data.name: TipColorScheme
data.value: Paper colors: background, accents, and muted text.

data.name: TipUiFont
data.value: Language default picks system fonts for UI and note body separately. YaHei or DengXian unifies UI, tray, capsules, todos, and notes. If papertodo.ttf / .otf is in the app folder, that font is preferred.

data.name: TipTextRenderingProfile
data.value: Standard: Windows/WPF default path; best compatibility. Soft: two-axis grayscale smoothing; may look softer at some scales. Sharp: stronger pixel alignment; clearer outlines; a few fonts may change width slightly.

data.name: TipCustomFontEnhancedBold
data.value: Bold text uses the bold font file from the app folder. Place both papertodo and PaperTodo_Bold (.ttf/.otf).

data.name: TipMarkdownRender
data.value: Basic: light Markdown highlighting. Enhanced: nicer headings, lists, and emphasis.

data.name: TipFullscreenTopmostMode
data.value: When video, games, or other fullscreen apps are detected, papers and edge capsules can step aside. “Stay on top” keeps them always visible.

data.name: TipTodoVisualSize
data.value: Todo text, row height, and spacing.

data.name: TipEnableTodoNoteLinks
data.value: Drag a note onto a todo to link it, then open the note from that item.

data.name: TipShowLinkedNoteName
data.value: Show the linked note title after the todo.

data.name: TipAllowLongLinkedNoteTitles
data.value: Off: compact. On: wider to fit content. About 5 full-width characters on one line, 10 on multiline.

data.name: TipHideLinkedNotesFromCapsules
data.value: Notes linked to todos leave the capsule list, avoiding duplicate entries.

data.name: TipRunLinkedScriptCapsulesOnClick
data.value: If linked to a script capsule: left-click runs it, right-click opens edit.

data.name: TipNewTodoButton
data.value: Show “New todo” in the paper top bar.

data.name: TipNewNoteButton
data.value: Show “New note” in the paper top bar.

data.name: TipExternalOpenButton
data.value: Top-bar external open: write the note to a temp file and hand it to the default app.

data.name: TipExternalExtension
data.value: File suffix for external open, e.g. .md or .txt.

data.name: TipCapsuleMode
data.value: Collapse papers into small capsules to free desktop space. Edge features need this first.

data.name: TipDeepCapsuleMode
data.value: Dock capsules to the screen edge as a queue; they slide out on hover.

data.name: TipShowDeepCapsuleWhileExpanded
data.value: Keep the edge entry after expanding a paper; when off, hide it while open.

data.name: TipRememberDeepCapsuleExpandedPosition
data.value: When expanding from the edge, restore the last position and size; otherwise use edge placement.

data.name: TipCollapseExpandedDeepCapsuleOnClick
data.value: If the paper is already expanded from the edge, click the same capsule again to retract it.

data.name: TipCapsuleCollapseAll
data.value: Show a master capsule at the top of the queue to collapse or expand it.

data.name: TipMaxTitleLength
data.value: Max characters shown in paper titles and capsules.

data.name: TipStartup
data.value: Start PaperTodo when Windows signs in.

data.name: TipHidePapersFromTaskbar
data.value: Expanded papers do not appear on the taskbar. Still reachable via tray, desktop papers, and capsules. Also forced on when “Hide papers from window switching” is on.

data.name: TipHidePapersFromWindowSwitcher
data.value: Hide expanded papers from Alt+Tab and Task View, and hide taskbar icons too. Still reachable via tray, desktop papers, and capsules.

data.name: TipEnableToolTips
data.value: Brief hints when the pointer rests on buttons or interactive areas. Settings info icons always stay available.

data.name: TipEnableAnimations
data.value: Transition animations for common actions; off feels more immediate.

data.name: TipPersistentPowerShellProcess
data.value: !pf / !powerf use a persistent process for faster starts; variables and state may carry across scripts. Turning this off ends that process.

data.name: TipPreferPowerShell7
data.value: Prefer pwsh.exe (PowerShell 7); fall back to Windows PowerShell if missing. Scripts can also use !pwsh / !ps5.

data.name: TipHideScriptRunWindow
data.value: Hide the script run window. !p / !power wait for exit and capture errors; !pf / !powerf only submit to the persistent process.

data.name: TipAutoClearCompletedTodos
data.value: Checking a todo as done removes it from the paper; Undo can restore it.

data.name: TipAutoCompressLargeImages
data.value: Over 8 MB, or any side over 2048 px: try scaling to a 2048-px longest edge and re-encode. Cancel import if compression is unsafe, fails, stays over 8 MB, or does not shrink the file. Off: no compression; over 8 MB is rejected. Either way, any side over 4096 px is rejected.

data.name: SettingsHideLinkedNotesFromCapsules
data.value: Linked notes not shown as capsules

data.name: TipAdvancedSettingsMode
data.value: When on, shows advanced settings. When off, only hides those items; selected values stay unchanged.

data.name: TipOverallFontScale
data.value: Overall text scale 80%–120% in 5% steps. Per-note percentage zoom stacks on top.

data.name: TipImageReferenceText
data.value: Controls Markdown image markup visibility. “Editing only”: hidden while viewing. “Always hide”: text is transparent but still selectable.

data.name: TipNoteBodyTextStyle
data.value: Small / medium / large on top of overall size, optional bold. Per-note percentage zoom stacks on top.

data.name: TipTodoBodyTextStyle
data.value: Todo body and row height: small / medium / large, optional bold.

data.name: TipTitleTextStyle
data.value: Paper title bar: small / medium / large, optional bold.

data.name: TipCapsuleTextStyle
data.value: Normal, edge, drag, and master capsule text: one size and bold setting.

data.name: TipDeepCapsuleTitleMeasureLimit
data.value: Measure edge capsule width from the first N title characters only; the title is not truncated and normal capsules are unchanged. “All” keeps the previous width behavior.

data.name: ShortcutEnableTip
data.value: Register or unregister this global shortcut immediately.

data.name: ShortcutGroupEdgeSequencesTip
data.value: Modifiers + digits 1–9 open the Nth capsule in a side queue. Master capsule is not counted.

data.name: ShortcutEdgeEnableTip
data.value: Register or unregister this side’s full 1–9 set immediately.

data.name: ShortcutEdgeKeyTip
data.value: Press and release 2–3 modifiers (Ctrl / Alt / Shift / Win) to finish recording. Digits 1–9 are fixed; left and right queues cannot share the same modifiers.

data.name: ShortcutEdgeLeftTip
data.value: Prefer this monitor’s left queue 1–9, then the opposite side and neighbors. Default modifiers: Ctrl+Shift.

data.name: ShortcutEdgeRightTip
data.value: Prefer this monitor’s right queue 1–9, then the opposite side and neighbors. Default modifiers: Ctrl+Alt.

data.name: ShortcutEdgeDigitsFixedTip
data.value: Digits are fixed to 1–9; only the modifiers can change.
